JUDGE: VISITING JUDGE LARRY DIER/CLERK:ECLAVERIA/RPTR: DONNA SULLIVAN-COSTILLO C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. PLFF AND COUNSEL PRESENT, DEFT NOT PRESENT IN AM BUT IN COURT IN PM - HIS COUNSEL PRESENT, AND JURY PANEL. ROLL CALL MADE ON PANEL, JURY SELECTION BEGAN AND ENDED - JURY FORMED AND SWORN. NO ALTERNATES SELECTED. TRIAL BEGAN. ORAL AND EVIDENTIARY TESTIMONY PRESENTED BY PLFF AND DEFT. BOTH SIDES RESTED. JURY INSTRUCTIONS READ TO THE JURY BY COURT. CLOSING ARGUMENTS MADE BY BOTH SIDES. JURY TRIAL CONTINUED TO 9:30AM, 7/24/96 FOR FINAL JURY INSTRUCTIONS, SWEARING OF BAILIFF AND JURY DELIBERATION
PER DIEM FEES DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF WINE, CHARLES

CONT'D JURY TRIAL FROM 7/23/96 - COURT RECONVENED. ALL PRESENT - JURY, PLFF & COUNSEL, DEFT AND COUNSEL. FURTHER JURY INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY COURT TO JURY. BAILIFF SWORN & JURY WENT TO JURY ROOM FOR DELIBERATION. AT 10:04AM, JURY BACK IN COURT WITH VERDICT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF FOR TOTAL OF $5000. VERDICT READ AND ENTERED BY ORDER OF COURT. JURY NOT POLLED - WAIVED BY BOTH SIDES. JURY RELEASED FROM ADMONITIONS AND SENT TO JURY ASSEMBLY ROOM. EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN. PLFF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO VERDICT.
